summary: Iteration 20 - HTB Electrical Substation Update Testing Complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified. Major change: replaced 101 hardcoded HTB substations with 3,569 real OSM-sourced substations. Map API shows 1,091 (≥225kV), distance calculations use all 3,569.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (11/11) ===
GET /api/ returns API info (version 1.0.0)
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns 1091 postes HTB (was 101)
Postes HTB have valid format: asset_id, nom, type, geometry, tension_kv, puissance_mva, region
All postes on map API have tension_kv >= 225kV (range: 225-400kV)
Postes have S3REnR enrichment data where available
GET /api/map/dc returns 61 DC existants
GET /api/map/submarine-cables returns 15 cables
GET /api/france/communes?q=Villepinte returns results
GET /api/s3renr/summary returns region data (IDF, PACA, HdF)
GET /api/map/rte-future-400kv returns GeoJSON with line + buffers
GET /api/map/landing-points returns 8 landing points
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
Login page loads correctly with Google Auth button
Dashboard loads with map showing all infrastructure layers
Status bar shows '1091 postes' (updated from 101)
Postes HTB layer toggle works (1091 markers displayed)
Layer toggle on/off functionality verified
S3REnR summary visible in sidebar (IDF: SATURÉ, PACA: ACTIF, HdF: ACTIF)
Poste markers show MW availability labels where S3REnR data available
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user 'test_user_01' with session for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified the HTB electrical substation update. Key changes: 1) rte_postes_map.json now contains 1,091 postes (≥225kV) for map display (was 101 hardcoded). 2) rte_postes_all.json contains 3,569 postes (≥63kV) for distance calculations. 3) Data sourced from OSM/Overpass with France polygon filter to exclude border-country substations. 4) S3REnR matching uses regional fallbacks and aliases. 5) All previous features (chat, PDF export, compare mode, water/road data) should still work. All APIs are live (no mocked APIs).

htb_update_verification.data_source: OSM/Overpass API with France polygon filter
htb_update_verification.s3renr_enrichment: Working - postes matched with S3REnR capacity data

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - All data is real from OSM/Overpass and S3REnR
